transcript_log: Advocate: Hi, this is Maya from care coordination. I'm calling Sunrise Family Medicine about Eleanor Martinez...

Advocate: Hi, this is Maya from care coordination, following up on Eleanor Martinez's DME order from Dr. Sarah Chen.

Front desk: The written order was signed and submitted today.

Advocate: Can you confirm the billing code on the signed paperwork?

Front desk: The order on file is for a power wheelchair, billing code K0002.

Advocate: We were expecting a standard manual wheelchair, billing code K0001. Can that be corrected?

Front desk: I can flag it for the clinical team, but the signed order currently shows K0002.

Advocate: Hi, this is Maya from care coordination. I'm calling Sunrise Family Medicine about Eleanor Martinez, a 72-year-old Medicare Part B patient in Chicago. She had a visit with Dr. Sarah Chen three days ago and needs a written order for a standard manual wheelchair, billing code K0001.

Front desk: One moment... I see Eleanor Martinez in the chart. There's a verbal order noted from the visit, but the written order has not been submitted yet. It's in the medical assistant queue waiting for Dr. Chen to review.

Advocate: Can you confirm her Medicare Part B coverage and that the order is for K0001 manual wheelchair?

Front desk: Yes, Medicare Part B is on file. The verbal note mentions manual wheelchair. Written paperwork still pending doctor signature.

Advocate: When should I call back to check status?

Front desk: Try again in a few days — the MA queue is backed up this week.

Advocate: Hi, Maya from care coordination, following up on Eleanor Martinez. I'm checking on the written order for her standard manual wheelchair, billing code K0001.

Front desk: Thanks for calling back. The order is being prepared in the medical assistant queue. Dr. Chen has not signed the written order yet, but it is actively being worked on.

Advocate: Do you have an estimate for when the signed order will be ready?

Front desk: The queue is still backed up. Please check back in 2 days and we should have an update.

Advocate: Hi, Maya from care coordination, checking on Eleanor Martinez's wheelchair order.

Front desk: Good timing. Dr. Chen signed the written order this morning and it has been submitted to the chart.

Advocate: Can you confirm the equipment and billing code on the signed order?

Front desk: Yes — standard manual wheelchair, billing code K0001. Medicare Part B is on file for Eleanor Martinez.

Advocate: Thank you. That is everything we needed.

Front desk: You're welcome. Have a good day.
patient_message_draft: Hello Eleanor Martinez, this is Maya from care coordination. Good news — Dr. Sarah Chen has signed the written order for your standard manual wheelchair (billing code K0001). We are moving forward with Medicare Part B coordination.
last_decision_summary: Written order for standard manual wheelchair, billing code K0001, signed and submitted to chart.
